meta.title: White Amfora — Beachfront Apartments in Shëngjin, Albania
meta.description: Sea-view apartments steps from the Rana e Hedhun beach in Shëngjin, Albania. Spacious, self-catering stays on the northern Adriatic coast.

hero.title: White Amfora
hero.tagline: Sea-view apartments on the quiet Rana e Hedhun beach

intro.title: A quiet stretch of the Adriatic, with room to settle in
intro.body: White Amfora sits where the pines meet the sand at Rana e Hedhun, one of the calmest corners of the Shëngjin coast. Each apartment has its own kitchen, a living room to spread out in, and a balcony facing the sea. Come for a week, cook a long lunch, and let the afternoons go slow.

highlights.title: What makes a stay here easy

items.label: Steps from the beach
items.desc: About 700 m to the Rana e Hedhun sand and pines.

items.label: Sea-view balconies
items.desc: Wake up to the Adriatic from your own balcony.

items.label: Your own kitchen
items.desc: A full kitchen and living room in every apartment.

items.label: Free parking
items.desc: Park on site and forget the car all week.

items.label: Fast Wi-Fi
items.desc: Quick, free connection throughout your stay.

items.label: 51 km from Tirana airport
items.desc: An easy drive up the coast to Shëngjin.

apartments.title: The apartments
apartments.intro: Spacious, light, and made for more than one night.
apartments.card_meta: Two bedrooms · Living room · Sea-view balcony
apartments.card_body: Two bedrooms, a living room, and a kitchen that opens onto a balcony over the sea. Room for a family or two couples sharing the coast.
apartments.more_body: We are confirming the full range of apartments. Message us and we will tell you what is available for your dates.

gallery.title: Around White Amfora
gallery.intro: The beach, the light, and the long Adriatic evenings.

location.title: Where you'll be
location.intro: On the northern Albanian coast at Rana e Hedhun, just south of Shëngjin town. A quiet beach in front, and easy day trips within reach.

testimonials.title: What guests notice first

items.quote: The most beautiful part of the Shëngjin beach is right in front. Clean sand, clear water, and pines for shade.
A spacious apartment with a real kitchen and a balcony straight onto the sea. Quiet, and easy with the family.
Calm even in August. You walk out and you are on the sand. Exactly what we wanted.

testimonials.note: Representative of recent guest feedback for the Rana e Hedhun area. Real guest quotes to follow.

cta.title: Plan your stay at White Amfora
cta.body: Tell us your dates and we will come back with availability and a price. The fastest way to reach us is WhatsApp.

alt.hero: Pine trees above a quiet turquoise cove on the Albanian Adriatic coast
alt.intro: Open balcony doors framing the sea and coastal pines
alt.apartment: Bright, airy apartment interior with sea light
alt.location: Adriatic bay and beach seen from the pine-covered hillside
alt.gallery1: Sea view through a balcony at dusk
alt.gallery2: Sandy Albanian beach lined with umbrellas
alt.gallery3: Oleander flowers along the coastal path
alt.gallery4: Shëngjin-area coastal town above the water

footer.tagline: Sea-view, self-catering apartments on the Rana e Hedhun beach in Shëngjin, Albania.
footer.disclaimer: Details and imagery are being confirmed with the property.
